title: Every time period create a new subitem with the month as the subitem name
excerpt:
I am looking for an automation that firstly creates a new subitem every month but also has the month as the subitem name. 
We have tasks (parent items) that require a monthly check/progress update, we want to be able to …

posts.author: carolinefrobinson (Caroline)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for an automation that firstly creates a new subitem every month but also has the month as the subitem name.
We have tasks (parent items) that require a monthly check/progress update, we want to be able to at the end of each month have the next months subitem created automatically but with the name automatically populated to the month proceeding.
Please tell me this is possible somehow!

posts.author: Damian (Premium Digital)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi im looking the same thing, i cant make automation with every time period to make new subitem.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @carolinefrobinson and @Damian ,

We have created an app Recurring Tasks Schedule Pro - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to setup recurring creation of subitem as per set schedule, and also allows you to configure date (& month) based naming for the created subitem.
